name: Daniel Mckinley
tagline: Serving communities in Peru with faith and compassion
missionStatement: Sharing the love of Christ through church planting, discipleship, and compassionate outreach across Peru's cities and highlands.
intro: Daniel Mckinley is a Canadian missionary who answered a calling to serve in Peru for eight transformative years. From urban church partnerships in Lima to village outreach in the Andean highlands, his ministry focused on building lasting relationships, equipping local leaders, and meeting practical needs with the gospel at the center.
prayerInfo: We welcome prayer partners who wish to stand with ongoing ministry in Peru. Pray for local church leaders, youth programs, and families facing economic hardship in rural communities.
